title: Ghost (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ghost''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
[[File:The Ghost USW NE.png|thumb|right|300px|The ''Ghost'']]
*[[Force spirit]], also known as '''Force ghost''', a usually [[Light side of the Force|light side]] [[Force power|Force technique]] to maintain one's identity after physical death.
*[[Ghost (folklore)|'''Ghosts''']], creatures of folklore.
*"'''[[Ghost Star]]'''", a [[lullaby]] sung by [[Bode Akuna|Bode]] and [[Kata Akuna]].
*The '''''[[Ghost]]''''', a [[VCX-100 light freighter]] that was owned by [[Hera Syndulla]] and used the home for the [[Spectres]] rebel cell.
*The '''[[Ghost Nebula sector]]''', an [[Expansion Region]] [[nebula]] in which [[Umbara]] was located.
*'''[[Ghost Company]]''', a unit of the [[212th Attack Battalion]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Spirits and folklore===
*'''[[Force ghost/Legends|Force ghosts]]''', the spirits of dead [[The Force/Legends|Force users]]
*'''[[Ghost (folklore)/Legends|Ghosts]]''', folkloric creatures
*'''[[Ghost ship]]s'''

===Creatures===
*'''[[Ghost spider]]''', a creature from [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]
*'''[[Garollian ghost viper]]''', a creature from the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Ghost Base]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on [[Krant]]
*The '''[[Ghost Nebula/Legends|Ghost Nebula]]''', a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] in the Expansion Region
*The '''[[Ghost Tide Nebula]]''', a nebula in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]]
*The '''[[Valley of the Spirits]]''', a location on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]

===Military units===
*The '''[[Ghost (Death Watch)|Ghosts]]''', a unit of [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]]
*'''[[Ghost Battalion]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spec ops unit
*'''[[Ghost Company/Legends|Ghost Company]]''', a unit of the [[212th Attack Battalion]]
*'''[[Ghost Squad]]''', a unit of the [[Specialists]]
*'''[[Ghost Squadron]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit

===Starships===
*The '''''[[Ghost (CR90 corvette)|Ghost]]''''', a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]
*The '''''[[Hungry Ghost]]''''', a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]]

===Other===
*'''[[Ghost (clone trooper)|Ghost]]''', a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]
*'''[[Ghost (Neimoidian)|Ghost]]''', a [[Neimoidian]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]]
*'''[[Ghost Jedi]]''', a band
*'''[[Ghost Leader]]''', a [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]]
*'''[[Ghost rattle/Legends|Ghost rattle]]''', a device used to ward off evil spirits
*'''[[Ghostwave]]''', a form of encryption

==Real world==
===Canon media===
*"'''[[Ghosts of Mortis]]'''", an episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
*"'''[[Ghosts of Geonosis]]'''", a two-part episode of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''

===Legends media===
*'''[[Ghost (comic story)|''Ghost'']]''', a comic
*'''''[[Tatooine Ghost]]''''', a novel
*'''''[[Galaxy of Fear: Ghost of the Jedi]]'''''
*'''''[[The Red Ghost: An Ewok Adventure]]'''''
*'''''[[Star Wars: Legacy: Ghosts]]'''''
